sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react' import './home.css' // Import images import Rukzak from '../../assets/rukzak.png' import DressMen from '../../assets/dresMenns.png' import { Link } from 'react-router-dom' const Home = () => { const [showContent, setShowContent] = useState(true) const [events] = useState([ { id: 1, image: Rukzak, name: 'Stylish Beckpok', price: '$20.00' }, { id: 2, image: DressMen, name: 'T-short', price: '$20.00', subPrice: '$540.00' } ]) return (

Home

<button>Submit</button> <div className="cartContainer"> <div className="cart"> {events.map((event) => ( <Link to="/test" key={event.id}> <div className="cartInner"> <img src={event.image} alt={event.id}/> <div className='subCart'> <h2>{event.name}</h2> <div className="preces"> <p>{event.price}</p> {event.subPrice && <p>{event.subPrice}</p>} </div> </div> </div> </Link> ))} </div> </div> </div> ) } export default Home
